projects.title: DubbelDutch
projects.impact: Empowered expats to achieve A2 Dutch proficiency through immersive media consumption.
projects.challenge: Bypassing native video player constraints to inject synchronized dual-language subtitle tracks.
projects.description: A Google Chrome extension providing real-time English translations for NPO.nl and Kijk.nl. It bridges the gap for language learners by displaying dual Dutch/English subtitles simultaneously.

projects.title: AgriteQ
projects.impact: Streamlined application workflows for over 500 international exhibitors and contractors.
projects.challenge: Implementing a complex, multi-role administrative dashboard with real-time approval states.
projects.description: A comprehensive digital suite for Qatar's International Agricultural Exhibition. Includes a multilingual public site and an admin dashboard for analytics, application management, and task tracking.

projects.title: CineDB
projects.impact: Created a high-performance movie discovery tool with optimized image loading and search.
projects.challenge: Managing complex state for dynamic filtering and infinite scrolling across thousands of TMDB entries.
projects.description: A sleek movie database application. It leverages the TMDB API to provide detailed film insights, trailers, and ratings within a responsive, high-contrast interface.

projects.title: Enterprise REST API
projects.impact: Standardized data access patterns for internal user and product management services.
projects.challenge: Securing sensitive endpoints using JWT-based authentication and custom validation logic.
projects.description: A robust RESTful API built with Java and Spring Boot. Focuses on scalable architecture, secure authentication, and optimized database querying for enterprise resource management.

projects.title: Entso-E Dashboard
projects.impact: Visualized complex energy grid data into actionable insights for efficiency monitoring.
projects.challenge: Rendering large-scale real-time datasets using D3.js without sacrificing UI responsiveness.
projects.description: An energy management platform that transforms raw ENTSO-E data into interactive visualizations, allowing users to track consumption and production trends globally.

projects.title: Lung Cancer Detection
projects.impact: Contributed to early detection research with a DCGAN model capable of identifying cancerous nodules.
projects.challenge: Training a Generative Adversarial Network on high-resolution CT scans with limited GPU memory.
projects.description: BSc Thesis project utilizing Deep Convolutional Generative Adversarial Networks (DCGAN) to improve the accuracy of lung cancer screening from medical imaging.

side-projects.title: Advent of Code Challenge 2025
side-projects.description: A collection of coding challenges and puzzles from the Advent of Code event. Each challenge tests problem-solving skills and algorithmic thinking, providing an opportunity to improve coding proficiency and learn new techniques.

side-projects.title: Flip Card Component - Animate UI
side-projects.description: A reusable flip card component with smooth animations for interactive user interfaces. This component can be used to display content on both sides of the card, enhancing the visual appeal and user experience of web applications.

side-projects.title: 1 Billion Rows Challenge (Java)
side-projects.description: An exploration of high-performance file processing in Java. This project focuses on parsing and aggregating large-scale weather data efficiently while experimenting with streams, hash maps, and multithreading techniques.
